Describe the visual progression from the initial building exteriors to the final food interaction.
canonical_answer: At 0s, the CIA at Copia building exterior with garden plots appears; at 4s, close-ups of butter cubes and breaded food items are shown; at 12s, the Model Bakery storefront with green awnings is visible; at 18s, hands pull apart a golden-brown pastry to reveal the soft interior.

question: Have the round pastries started frying on the griddle yet?
